name: @coji/ldash-cli
description: CLI tool for Lightdash API - query data, explore models, manage dashboards and charts

scripts.generate: mkdir -p src/generated && curl -f -o src/generated/swagger.json https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lightdash/lightdash/main/packages/backend/src/generated/swagger.json && openapi-typescript src/generated/swagger.json -o src/generated/api.ts && node scripts/patch-generated.js
scripts.build: rm -rf dist && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && chmod +x dist/*.js
scripts.fix: pnpm run format:fix && pnpm run lint --fix
scripts.prepublishOnly: pnpm run validate && pnpm run build

author: coji
